assistantText:
Yes, that will work. Skills are auto-discovered from top-level directories under `/opt/data/skills/` that contain a `SKILL.md` file. The problem is just the nesting — `.agents/skills/frontend-design/` is too deep.

I'll copy it to `/opt/data/skills/frontend-design/` with correct ownership, then clean up the `.agents/` tree

Approval needed — the script copies files and changes ownership. I need you to approve the execution to
